---
title: "Teaching"
pagetitle: "Teaching — Dany Lauzon"
---

I teach geostatistics and mining geology at Polytechnique Montréal, in the courses GLQ3401 — Geostatistics and Mining Geology and GLQ3651 — Mining Geology. The course notes are open access and updated each term. The book is written in French.

[{{< fa book-open >}} Open the course notes](https://danlauz.github.io/glq3401-3651/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Course notes — Geostatistics and Mining Geology

Thirteen chapters in three parts, with appendices.

### Part I — Mining geology

1. NI 43-101 Technical Report and the Mining Act
2. Economic aspects
3. Gy's sampling theory and quality control
4. Processing and statistical analysis of drilling data
5. Deterministic methods for resource estimation

### Part II — Linear geostatistics

6. Introduction to geostatistics
7. The variogram
8. Block, dispersion and estimation variance
9. Kriging

### Part III — Non-linear geostatistics

10. Multivariate geostatistics
11. Indicator kriging
12. Geostatistical simulation of continuous variables
13. Geostatistical simulation of categorical variables

### Appendices

- A — Linear algebra: vectors and planes
- B — Probability and statistics
- C — Standard normal distribution table
- D — Charts: dispersion variances
- E — Charts: estimation variances
- G — Mathematical notation
